MY RECORD ON PARLIAMENT.UK My expenses The Independent Parliamentary Standards Authority (IPSA) is the independent body that regulates and administers the business costs and decides the pay and pensions of MPs and their staff. The expense and allowance claims for individual MPs are published regularly and can be viewed on the IPSA website. You can access details of my claims here or via the button below.
